private static final String PLAIN_ASCII =
            "AaEeIiOoUu"
                    + // grave
                    "AaEeIiOoUuYy"
                    + // acute
                    "AaEeIiOoUuYy"
                    + // circumflex
                    "AaOoNn"
                    + // tilde
                    "AaEeIiOoUuYy"
                    + // umlaut
                    "Aa"
                    + // ring
                    "Cc"
                    + // cedilla
                    "OoUu"; // double acute
private static final String EMPTY = "";
private static final String SPACE = " ";
